title: JAW Lab
description: Some laboratory stuff: decorations, key doors, code doors e.t.c
body: This mod adds a key door system with a keycards system verificated via networks with security systems that gives ability to create multiple facilities with different networks in single world. Also mod adds many functional and decorative blocks ## Networks Networks gives ability to create many autonomic facilities with diffirent keycards. ### Features: - Roles - Access levels - UUID verification Roles allows to do specific actions: adding users, configurate keydoors, manage keycards level e.t.c ### Roles: - Founder - Admin - Moderator - User ## Keycards Keycards activates different mechanisms: key doors or keycard interfaces. Keycard level is not binded to it's actual texture. You can set any level Features: - Individual name - UUID verification (coming in 0.8) - Access level - Network ## Doors Mod adds key doors and code doors. Key doors can be opened via keycards, code doors can be only open by providing password. All the doors closes after a small delay but this can be disabled in door settings To the key doors you can set any level: from 0 to billiards Code doors password cannot be longer than 9 symbols ## Barrier Gates Mod adds a gates system - multiblock structure 16xinfinite blocks maximum. Currently there is only on type of gate: blocker-gate; If turned on - solid. Planned to add: laser-gate (kills you) and check-gate (fizzlers blacklisted items) Also improving visualisation is planned. | Blocker-Gate | Laser-Gate | Fizzler-Gate 3 | |---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:| | Currently creative only | In developmet | In developmet | | Blocks player from passing threw | Kills player | Fizzlers blacklisted items | ## Decorations Currently there aren't many decoration block, more will be added in future updates Want to suggest an idea? Leave it in [discord server](https://discord.gg/yMAXVDabCs)! P.S if you are a designer - dm me in [discord](https://discord.gg/yMAXVDabCs) to improve visual. I'm bad at this... ## Usage To set up door you first need to create network. Use keycard programmator. ![Networking Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56987e17d6f95214d39d113c420065b409a369d1.png) First you see a network name ![Network Name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcd969ab30971b06e42dc8fcabeec3a71235201e.png) Currently selected user ![Current User](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/229548d29e8ac91d530698540840c05b9f2b1805.png) But how to add Network and User? Type Network Name at the bottom box to set a name ![Name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d7d5a65d0ed92ebbd5aabb4309f9194aaa2b42.png) Then click add button at the left Minus button deletes network ![Add button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85f8650e0ac8f23d249863932f28650bc6f4036a.png) Now your menu changed and you will see something like this ![Stage 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2a248da9d3fff1fc0eb1af01ea0502f2caf6329.png) To add user you need to type a username at box below (replace your network name) and then click one of these buttons as like network management above ![User management](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab4e406087eb81428e7d09d658e562e256eabdba.png) Now you can view this user settings: his role and access level. But how do you manage it? ![Adding user](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/134f14fca0bb05c1cae78efda82a28df46af8b45.png) There are a few buttons on the right ![User management](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c1f3950a823480957a6a407856684eeb8b272e2.png) Arrows changes user role: member / moderator / admin / founder Plus and minus buttons manages user level Magnifying glass button used to find players. For example if you want to chage someones properties you can type his name at box below and click this button. System will found this user in selected network But why do we need user level and roles? Now let's move to Keycard menu ![Keycard Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb2bcf5b5258144c02d9e3adb9b66ecdddf05bb7.png) Here you can view keycard's properties. First of all you need to bind your keycard to network. To do this you need a role at least moderator. Adding networks is similar to the network creation we did before ![Network added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d63ee32e150abcadb80691c43141106968107324.png) Now you can change keycard properties. To set level you have a buttons on the right. Level can be changed only by moderators and higher. But moderators can modify level in case their user level we changed in network configuration is higher. For example: User level: 5; User Role: Moderator; That means this user can set keycard level up to 5; Admins and Founder has no restrictions in management. You propably noticed these buttons. They are manages first two parameters of keycard. ![Management](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76fd4691cc5c5f583a255a0554a6a2f959d2b407.png) Final variant of the keycard configuration ![Stage 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d199306ccaa14f32ecead152a1a1b54cb11a64f2.png) ## How to add keydoors? You need Door Programmator ![Door Programmator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d58111fa4e4bc4d39a6d538211c8a18dfa9c8c8.png) First of all set it's configuration as well as your keycards ![Door Programmator Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eae11c1ebda868a64244ed00d84dd7ca31f63d07.png) Then click on KeyDoor and manage it's configuration ![KeyDoor GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/869b420aa321d379e0c316e6ee62d5da5e7475e0.png) ![KeyDoor GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b32014c807c12cdd25fb5b72d372644645da60f2.png) !! Warning !! After setting network you need to re-open GUI This button sets auto closing. By default keydoor closes in few seconds. But if you switch it's mode it will kept opened untill you click it with hand. ![Timer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cec8e1820008766c805c957362c61c91d19a1619.png) Most of the assets belongs to [Nazzy](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQ2L7O1KDK7ze75dSe1C-yg)
